title: Copper Golem
description: I was not satisfied with the outcome of the 2021 mob vote, so I made this data pack for those who wanted the Copper Golem to win!
body:
![Promotional image of the datapack](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/xusea1ukupoo5q2j3va9n/coppergolem_promo.png?rlkey=nqj8olxlsc4s2lqsl0i3guupm&st=8fdj3qct&dl=1)
_(Edited promotional image, does not work the same in-game)_

## Copper Golem

### How to summon 🧱

Build **this structure**, then **place a button** on the **copper block** and press it. You can use a copper block in **any oxidized and waxed state**, and it will generate the respective copper golem according to the block used.

![Copper Golem Summon Structure #1](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/rc8fhcccf0zylze5utual/build_copper_golem_1s.png?rlkey=c2xxvgrvgwgzlnrristrzg8et&st=pxdxawck&dl=1) ![Copper Golem Summon Structure #2](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/7b79kagdgz5qmq3qi1x97/build_copper_golem_2s.png?rlkey=lbt9ceadrko8fqcpq08a6vrli&st=wx2n92b5&dl=1) ![Copper Golem Summon Structure #3](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/nt57ilkiwmgt6jgi3yeue/build_copper_golem_3s.png?rlkey=p85turdhjytqu9xsklamuauwr&st=aqvdgzc4&dl=1) ![Copper Golem Summon Structure #4](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/pyyan73czylt0ppjkwfpk/build_copper_golem_4s.png?rlkey=xyw0ngejjgyhw9mswis04liw9&st=2dm6kcct&dl=1)

<details>
<summary>Example GIF</summary>

![Summon Copper Golem](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/ghuuppvi20lafoo8d4qru/copper_golem_summon.gif?rlkey=38jmtbv96iq6b2awyhmmz5861&st=eju0jhji&dl=1)

</details>

![Copper Golem Phase #1](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/g3468evjfwjdbbpo3ba5e/copper_golem_1_s.png?rlkey=4sfai9gk2mrj750a7kacsgec8&st=3z77w7on&dl=1) ![Copper Golem Phase #2](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/6j431hiu61pf7nr2rza0p/copper_golem_2_s.png?rlkey=isqd93v6wypyyicvgy5b1s9n1&st=pk6w2si1&dl=1) ![Copper Golem Phase #3](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/pxa1t7rcbcx74nvkjt3zq/copper_golem_3_s.png?rlkey=o4qzj65zfcku32hknl2lqzazm&st=40v1j5yq&dl=1) ![Copper Golem Phase #4](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/2dizlg2kkbshjoqlw1tt0/copper_golem_4_s.png?rlkey=hjkcq81vn80amd2x6fuvz1313&st=hh3h9zch&dl=1)

If you use a **waxed copper block** the golem will **also spawn with that feature**! It will be indicated with some **waxed particles** when spawning.

<details>
<summary>Example GIF</summary>

![Waxed Copper Golem](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/2nq8poxxqe51to2s872ep/waxed_copper_summon.gif?rlkey=lyzb36oitymhbvlaq93maslrd&st=s9w1033l&dl=1)

</details>

### Attributes 🔧

The copper golem has **40 life points** _(20 hearts)_. It also does not take fall damage and cannot drown. Can drop between **1 and 4 copper ingots** upon **death**.

### Mechanics ⚙️

- The copper golem can press copper buttons that are a maximum of **3 blocks** away and randomly. _(the copper golem does not look for buttons and will not approach them, at the moment)_.
- The copper golem **oxidizes over time**, for each oxidation phase, its **speed of movement** will be **slightly reduced**, when it reaches the fourth and **final stage**, it will become a **statue** and will **not move**, nor **press buttons**.
- To **deoxidize** your copper golem you must **hit it with an axe** _(it will not die, as it heals completely once deoxidized, unless you hit it with a very strong attack capable of lowering all its life to 0)_ once your copper golem is deoxidized, it will act normally again.
- To **prevent** your copper golem **from rusting**, you can **drop a honeycomb** on its position, it will wax and its rusting cycle will stop, **with an axe** you can **remove the waxing**.
- In a **storm**, your copper golem can **attract lightning**, which will **deoxidize** your copper golem if it was rusted. If the golem is **under a roof**, it will **not attract any lightning**, when the conditions to attract lightning are met, the golem will emit some **electric particles** as a **warning**.

<details>
<summary>Example GIFs</summary>

![Copper Golem Mechanics #1](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/kp88f73ayo5nwiqd1ch2n/copper_golem_mechanics_1.gif?rlkey=u2viq63tujwfe17gm8w6qqzb5&st=uzc45n98&dl=1) ![Copper Golem Mechanics #2](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/hd4ayv3zhjsjdiubgmb97/copper_golem_mechanics_2.gif?rlkey=sjo82kd6gr3lp7l5alkxhf2j0&st=2bk6t57i&dl=1)

</details>

As you can't add new mobs to minecraft as with mods, this data pack uses a **zombie horse** as a **base entity**, so the copper golem will be considered as an **undead mob**, this causes it to take damage with healing potions and other details _(breeding is disabled)_.

As a detail, the golem rotates its head at times.

<details>
<summary>Example GIFs</summary>

![Copper Golem Animations #1](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/wwh4xzy13iq6jy3erj5hn/copper_golem_animations_1.gif?rlkey=khbj6298ioxvo87ao6jxq4qwr&st=bgs3wtdx&dl=1) ![Copper Golem Prank #1](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/2znt7ot6qxvm1q0wuww3n/copper_golem_tnt.gif?rlkey=ctlsdkmr67ogj875pj9vyg5cv&st=wuyhfiuq&dl=1)

</details>

## Copper Button

### How to craft 🛠️

![Copper Button Recipe #1](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/hyqisabhmcpaoekqdkl30/copperbutton_crafting.png?rlkey=jqyvom47uvbega1huwakd4tg6&st=t5pe47ck&dl=1)

You can use **any cut copper block** in **any oxidized and waxed state**.

### Mechanics ⚙️

- The copper button is the **only button** of all that the **copper golem will press**.
- The copper button **oxidizes over time**, unlike the copper golem, this does **not affect its function**, it is only visual.
- You can **wax** the copper button in the **same way** you wax the copper golem.
- To **scrape** the copper button, **right click** with an **axe** on it.

The copper button is **internally an item frame**, so you can place several copper buttons on the same block, but it will be removed instantly, and will drop the copper button item.

<details>
<summary>Example GIF</summary>

![Copper Button Showcase](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/lee13q8ccgyhrpy63xtyh/copper_button_showcase.gif?rlkey=vqt2gtmnzn9pc3gzp0j9br9d0&st=vx4w3rm4&dl=1)

</details>

## New advancements

1. **"The Button Masher":** Build a Copper Golem and summon it.

2. **"Come back to life, Copper!":** Scrape a copper Golem with an axe.

You can see them inside the game by opening the advancements menu with the **L key** or the key you have chosen for it.

<details>
<summary>Example GIF</summary>

![Advancements](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/7zkpzb8d8vbtiapdemawo/copper_golem_advancements.gif?rlkey=nfqrcxuzr9cy978bfsq9knzwe&st=qocxaa8b&dl=1)

</details>

## Videos

<details>
<summary>Release v1.0</summary>

One of the most relevant features of this version is that the copper golem could appear in villages, this is **no longer the case**, the only way to get a copper golem is to build it.
